name: Caitlin Stewart
description:
Loch Ness

You end up staying in a peaceful hotel, nestled in the Scottish highlands. Surrounded by nature and the clear air. Your path here entwines with Caitlin and the shy girl may be forced to finally come out of her shell and add some excitement to her life.

Thought this would be a cool concept, I’m absolutely in love with the nature in Scotland, and just think it’s the perfect setting for a romance!

Let me know any feedback! All reviews appreciated <3
creator: Nyzora
